testimonials.name: Sarah Johnson
testimonials.content: Theo delivered an exceptional web application that exceeded our expectations. His attention to detail and ability to translate requirements into clean, efficient code is remarkable. Highly recommended!

testimonials.name: Michael Chen
testimonials.content: Working with Theo was a pleasure. He transformed our vision into a beautiful, functional website. His creativity and technical expertise brought our project to life ahead of schedule.

testimonials.name: Emmanuel Rwema
testimonials.content: Theo is one of the most dedicated students I've had the pleasure to teach. His problem-solving abilities and eagerness to learn new technologies make him stand out.

testimonials.name: Demo User
testimonials.content: This is a demo testimonial showcasing the testimonial component. In a real project, this would be replaced with actual client feedback. The design demonstrates how testimonials appear in the portfolio.

projects.title: E-Commerce Platform
projects.description: A full-featured online shopping platform with cart functionality, user authentication, payment integration, and admin dashboard.

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.description: Personal portfolio website showcasing projects, skills, and contact information with modern animations and responsive design.

projects.title: Task Management App
projects.description: Collaborative task management application with real-time updates, drag-and-drop kanban boards, and team collaboration features.

projects.title: Weather Dashboard
projects.description: Weather application displaying current conditions and forecasts with beautiful visualizations and location-based updates.

projects.title: Chat Application
projects.description: Real-time chat application with private messaging, group chats, and file sharing capabilities.

projects.title: Blog Platform
projects.description: Content management system for blogging with markdown support, categories, tags, and SEO optimization.
